title: werauhia cowellii
intro: Werauhia cowellii, a member of the Bromeliad family, is a type of epiphytic plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Werauhia cowellii is often prepared as a tincture or infused in water to make a tea, which is consumed for its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
